lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear with several tears in the upholstery. Mechanical components require major repairs.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All components are in original, like-new condition.
Good condition.

Get ready for a great value with this reliable ride! While it shows some character and typical wear from its years on the road, it remains a dependable choice for your daily commutes. It’s an honest, functional vehicle that offers a fantastic entry point into car ownership. Perfect for someone who appreciates a solid runner at an accessible price!

This vehicle is in rough condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows heavy wear with visible rust on the rocker panels and several large dents. Inside, the upholstery is badly torn and the air conditioning is non-functional. Mechanically, the engine has a persistent oil leak and the suspension feels very loose, making it a challenge to drive safely in its current state. This would be best suited as a parts car or a major project for someone with the right tools.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional daily driver, though it shows its age in several areas. Mechanically, it starts and runs consistently, but the engine shows signs of high mileage and may require a tune-up soon. The exterior has some visible scratches, minor dings, and the clear coat is starting to fade on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but has some staining and noticeable wear on the driver's seat. All major electronics work, including the AC and power windows, though the radio display is occasionally temperamental. It is a solid choice for a buyer looking for a reliable car who doesn't mind some aesthetic imperfections and minor upcoming maintenance needs.

This expertly maintained vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Curated for the discerning driver who prioritizes both performance and reliability, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience supported by a consistent service history. A premier selection for those seeking a balanced investment in quality and longevity, this automobile stands as a testament to diligent ownership and professional care.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! It’s been well-cared for and runs like a dream. I’m sure the next owner is going to absolutely love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 987.2 Cayman S features the highly sought-after 3.4L 9A1 flat-six engine, utilizing Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) for optimized thermal efficiency and throttle response. Mated to a precision-gated 6-speed manual transaxle, the mid-engine layout ensures a low polar moment of inertia for exceptional lateral grip and turn-in. The chassis remains rigid, with the suspension geometry providing communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive fluid service and inspection of the cooling system's water pump and thermostat. A mechanically sound example with a clean power band and robust drivetrain, ready for spirited canyon carving or track-day duty.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior.

Experience the perfect blend of performance and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. Finished in a timeless metallic silver, the exterior retains a deep shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, complemented by a smoke-free cabin and a fully functional infotainment suite. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a complete service history and recent fluid changes. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes are responsive, ensuring a confident drive. This car has been garage-kept and primarily used for highway commuting, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking quality without the new-car price tag. Ready for its next chapter with all original manuals and two sets of keys included.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and sophisticated styling. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. With a documented history of service and a well-preserved interior, it offers an exceptional balance of luxury and dependability. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent care and a documented history of service, this automobile represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning driver who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness. Experience the assurance of quality engineering at a highly competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has been well-loved. It still looks great on the road and is ready for its next adventure with you. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways – you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS system. The powertrain is mated to a precise six-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal power delivery through the rear wheels. The chassis has been reinforced at the subframe
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Ready for pickup.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive overall shape, perfect for a driver who values both reliability and aesthetics. The exterior finish retains a deep luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use like small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the seating surfaces are supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and controls show very little wear. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone consistent scheduled maintenance. It starts promptly, idles smoothly, and provides a confident, comfortable ride. All power features, including the climate control and infotainment system, operate exactly as they should. With a clean title and a history of responsible ownership, this car offers a fantastic balance of luxury and performance for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a sophisticated blend of reliability and performance. This unit has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a compelling market valuation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Every aspect of this automobile has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and presentation.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-maintained, you’ve found it! This car is in wonderful shape and drives like a total dream. It’s got a clean interior and has been my trusty companion for a while now, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regularly serviced. No mechanical issues. Interior is well-maintained.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience for the discerning buyer who values both performance and comfort. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor signs of careful road use that are consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin remains a refined sanctuary; the high-quality upholstery is supple and free of significant wear, while every electronic feature—from the crisp sound system to the responsive climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, having been treated to regular service intervals. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. With a clean title and a history of responsible ownership, this car is ready for its next chapter and requires no immediate investment. It represents a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable, high-end vehicle that has been preserved with pride.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This specimen has been maintained to a high standard, exhibiting a robust mechanical profile and a well-preserved interior. It represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this specimen remains in commendable condition, ensuring reliability and a sophisticated driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a gem. It’s in really solid shape and has tons of life left for its next owner. It runs super smoothly and has been incredibly reliable for me day in and day out. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great and feels solid on the road, this is definitely the one for you! I've taken good care of it, and I'd love to see it go to a great new home. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. It remains mechanically robust with a recently serviced dual-VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to address known chassis fatigue. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. Suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein B16 adjustable coilovers for sharpened turn-in and reduced body roll. The exterior shows minor road wear consistent with its mileage, but the powertrain is dialed in for the purist driver.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic blend of reliability and style. The exterior remains in impressive shape, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the paint retains a high-gloss finish. Step inside to a clean, smoke-free interior where the premium upholstery shows very light wear and all power features—including the infotainment system and climate control—operate exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly thanks to a consistent service history, and the transmission shifts seamlessly. With recent tire rotations and a fresh oil change, this car is mechanically sound and ready for the road. It represents an excellent opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Presenting in commendable condition, it features a comprehensive service history and remains mechanically robust. Both the interior and exterior exhibit minimal wear consistent with responsible ownership, ensuring a premium driving experience for its next proprietor. We invite discerning buyers to inspect this exceptional example of automotive engineering.
